buses.note: Major bus interchange at Brunswick Street Mall.

driving.motorway_access: Inner City Bypass and Story Bridge access.
driving.approx_cbd_minutes_offpeak_note: Approximately 3 to 5 minutes to Brisbane CBD off-peak.

connections: Walking access to the CBD and James Street

secondary_state.name: Fortitude Valley State Secondary College and other catchments

lifestyle.shops_dining_note: James Street is the premium dining and retail precinct. Brunswick Street has the Valley's casual dining and bar scene. Howard Smith Wharves and Newstead Gasworks are within walking distance.

pockets.name: James Street precinct
pockets.character: Premium apartment stock and boutique retail.

pockets.name: Brunswick Street and entertainment precinct
pockets.character: Apartments close to the bar and dining strip.

buyer_profile.note: Buyers wanting walk-to-work and walk-to-dining lifestyle.
Strong rental demand from professionals and students.
Apartment-led downsizing close to the CBD and James Street.
